scene: Crude hand-drawn doodle in the channel's clean style, full 9:16 vertical composition, white background, confident black marker linework (NOT scribbly), selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. A 1930s street: a long row of humble little movie theaters each with a popcorn cart out front, and beside them a few tall fancy ornate theaters with chandeliers and a snooty doorman turning his nose up at a popcorn cart. Selective pop color: golden-yellow popcorn. No text, no letters, no numbers.

Crude hand-drawn doodle in the channel's clean style, full 9:16 vertical composition, white background, confident black marker linework (NOT scribbly), selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. Side-by-side fates, 1930s style: on one side the humble popcorn theaters bustling with a happy crowd and overflowing popcorn; on the other side the fancy ornate theaters boarded up, dark, shuttered, cobwebbed. Selective pop color: golden popcorn glowing on the thriving side. No text, no letters, no numbers.

Crude hand-drawn doodle in the channel's clean style, full 9:16 vertical composition, white background, confident black marker linework (NOT scribbly), selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. A giant glowing tub of popcorn held up like a rescue lifesaver ring over a small struggling old movie theater reaching up toward it, the popcorn as the thing saving it. Warm, hopeful. Selective pop color: golden popcorn. No text, no letters, no numbers.

Crude hand-drawn doodle in the channel's clean style, full 9:16 vertical composition, white background, confident black marker linework (NOT scribbly), selective pop color, drawn to fill the tall frame. Present day: an enormous tub of popcorn sitting on a king's throne wearing a small crown, towering over a tiny subservient movie theater building beside it, the popcorn is in charge now. Selective pop color: golden popcorn and a red crown. No text, no letters, no numbers.
